message:
test: add real-provider pipeline tests and permission-denied error paths

Adds 7 real-provider pipeline tests (CC→Codex, CC→Gemini, dry-run,
same-provider, source-hint, session-not-found, unknown-alias) that
exercise the full ConversionPipeline without mocks.

Adds 3 error path tests for permission-denied scenarios:
unreadable session file, read-only target dir, nonexistent file.

Total: 669 tests, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
